title: Grazielia multifida
taxonomy: Grazielia multifida is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. This plant belongs to the genus Grazielia, which is a group of flowering plants that are primarily found in South America. The Acanthaceae family is a large and diverse group of plants that includes many species of flowering plants, shrubs, and trees. Grazielia multifida is native to Brazil, where it can be found growing in a variety of habitats.
